parameters.text: =Reply capture: I could not act on that reply. To a NEEDS YOU letter, reply with one option letter, or continue to take the recommendation. To a PASS or REVISE letter, reply continue to queue the next session.
={{ 'Reply capture: could not fetch projects/' + $('Extract').first().json.repo + '.md from GitHub. Decision ' + $('Extract').first().json.letter + ' was NOT logged.' }}

parameters.jsCode:
const op = $('Build pause op').first().json;
return [{ json: { replyText: op.confirmText, chatId: op.chatId, replyToId: op.replyToId } }];
